name: Chile Con Carne Para Tamales (Chile-meat Filling)
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pounds beef or pork, stewed and shredded
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the meat and lard in a large skillet and fry the meat at medium heat until browned.
2. Add the flour to the meat and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
3. Add the chile powder, broth, and seasonings to the meat. Cook at medium heat for approximately 30 minutes, stirring constantly until the mixture has thickened.  See Red Chile Powder recipe. Varied amounts may be used.
